field.description: The field on which the Group By operation was executed.

numberOfResults.description: The number of query result items having this field value.

score.description: The Group By value score, computed from the `numberOfResults` value as well as from the position of the items having this value in the ranked query result set.

valueType.description: The type of Group By value.

computedFieldResults.description: The results of the computed fields (see the `computedFields` Group By parameter).

lookupValue.description:
> This property is deprecated; it should normally not be populated if the query was sent against a Coveo Cloud V2 index.

The lookup field value name.

Value.description: > This property is deprecated; it should not be populated by Search API V2 searches.

NumberOfResults.description: > This property is deprecated; it should not be populated by Search API V2 searches.

Score.description: > This property is deprecated; it should not be populated by Search API V2 searches.

ComputedFieldResults.description: > This property is deprecated; it should not be populated by Search API V2 searches.

LookupValue.description: > This property is deprecated; it should not be populated by Search API V2 searches.

globalComputedFieldResults.description: The global computed fields that were processed by the index.

Field.description: > This property is deprecated and Coveo Cloud V1 only; The lowercase `field` should be used instead.

GlobalComputedFieldResults.description: > This property is deprecated and V1 only; The lowercase `globalComputedFieldResults` should be used instead.
